song.title: You've Got It Worked Out
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C B C
song.lyrics:
[V1] You hold the world within the palm of Your hand The broken pieces and the wounds of our lives You mend Reveal our purpose as You bring us to life You keep us all, You keep us all in Your sight
[P] We let it out, we let it out, scream our voice away We let it out, we let it out, lose our breath to say You've got it, You've got it, You've got it worked out
[C] So take all we are, we'll trust in You with everything Take all we are, we're Yours now and forever Take all we are, we'll trust in You with everything You've got it, You've got it, You've got it worked out
[V2] Our pleasure isn't in the ways of hte world We turn our sight from the desires within ourselves WE know what glitters in the light of the day It can't compare, it can't compare to Your grace
[B] We take heart in the fire Our faith is in You Our heart beats for You Love now our desire Your cause our calling Your cause our calling
